sn11.17:1.1:
1
Sāvatthiyaṁ jetavane. Tena kho pana samayena bhagavā divāvihāragato hoti paṭisallīno. Atha kho sakko ca devānamindo brahmā ca sahampati yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā paccekaṁ dvārabāhaṁ nissāya aṭṭhaṁsu. Atha kho sakko devānamindo bhagavato santike imaṁ gāthaṁ abhāsi:
sn11.17:1.2:
2
"Uṭṭhehi vīra vijitasaṅgāma,
Pannabhāra anaṇa parajika loke;
Cittañca te suvimuttaṁ,
Cando yathā pannarasāya rattin"ti.
sn11.17:1.3:
3
"Na kho, devānaminda, tathāgatā evaṁ vanditabbā. Evañca kho, devānaminda, tathāgatā vanditabbā:
sn11.17:1.4:
4
‘Uṭṭhehi vīra vijitasaṅgāma,
Satthavāha anaṇa parajika loke;
Desassu bhagavā dhammaṁ,
Aññātāro bhavissantī’"ti.
